content: Cloudflare R2 pg_dump backup via Railway: use Railway 'Postgres to R2 Backup' template (github.com/BigDaddyAman/pg-r2-backup). Runs as a Railway cron service. Env vars: DATABASE_URL, R2_ENDPOINT (https://<account_id>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com), R2_ACCESS_KEY, R2_SECRET_KEY, R2_BUCKET_NAME, BACKUP_TIME (cron schedule). Alternatively use railwayapp-templates/postgres-s3-backups (Node.js, S3-compatible). R2 is S3-compatible; use aws cli or rclone. R2 free tier includes 10GB/month. Backup bucket must be created in R2 dashboard first.
